commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Chariots. Literally, "chariot. "2 Kings has only 700, and 40,000 horsemen. (Calmet)
Ten men might be in each chariot. (Du Hamel)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Seven thousand chariots: That is, of men who fought in chariots.
